headline: Session 44 turned the trade deadline into a structured General Manager market ritual while keeping launch evidence honest.

items.title: deadline-offer-ritual
items.evidence: Trade Deadline Frenzy now renders deterministic partner, need, ask, cap, rule, and risk fields from live dashboard inputs.

items.title: deadline-action-accessibility-refinement
items.evidence: Offer buttons now carry action metadata and offer-specific accessible labels.

items.title: test-shard-truth
items.evidence: The new trade-deadline regression file is assigned to the runtime shard and guarded by shard coverage.

followUps.title: email-forwarding receipt
followUps.evidence: Obtain real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com before SPARKED flip.

blockers.title: SPARKED launch evidence
blockers.evidence: Still blocked on on-domain email forwarding/copying proof and current live-origin/routing evidence.

honestyLedger.title: latest-audit-follow-through
honestyLedger.evidence: Rejected as stale after genius-list reported Session 44 audit exhausted with deadline-offer-ritual closed.

honestyLedger.title: missing closeout helper scripts
honestyLedger.evidence: render-state-vector, compute-entropy, append-genome-snapshot, and ops closeout-summary are not present locally.

diffStat.suite: direct default shards 292/292; Playwright UI 17/17; Pages build/smoke
